positive: A symmetrical, deeply detailed illustration of celestial flora: large, glowing bioluminescent moons and stylized geometric cosmic elements seamlessly interwoven with intricate jungle foliage, stylized lavender stalks, and crystalline star clusters. The composition is centered and highly decorative, utilizing negative space effectively. Style should be hyper-detailed linework, neo-art nouveau symmetry, etched onto deep midnight indigo velvet, contrasted by vibrant emerald greens, luminous gold leaf accents, and nebula purples. Strong, clean silhouettes are mandatory. Studio lighting, isolated on a solid dark background, graphic vector art quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, grainy, amateur, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, logo, watermark, signature, gradient blend, messy, noise, cartoon, low detail, realistic photograph
